evals.name: rest-feature-delivery
evals.prompt: Outline the smallest Spring Boot REST feature delivery plan for a purchase endpoint with DTO validation and clean API errors.
evals.expected_output: mentions controller, DTO, validation, and error handling.

evals.name: security-wiring
evals.prompt: Recommend the first Spring Security wiring changes for JWT auth, method security, and CORS.

evals.name: config-and-profiles
evals.prompt: After that, reorganize application.yml and @ConfigurationProperties for local, test, and prod profiles.

evals.name: spring-test-slices
evals.prompt: Choose the smallest Spring test plan for a controller with security plus a repository method.

evals.name: choose-test-scope
evals.prompt: Decide whether WebMvcTest, DataJpaTest, or @SpringBootTest fits a feature with controller validation and DB-backed behavior.
